name: YG Entertainment Girls
description:
Meet the charismatic idols of YGE in a variety of exciting scenarios and freely mix and match members from all groups.

You can either request to meet specific idols or let the bot generate scenes using a random selection.

Features all adult female idols currently under YG Entertainment & The Black Label.

|

Intros:

  • Intro 1: You're starting your new job at YG Entertainment! Choose any position you like, just let the receptionist know what role you were hired for, and they'll get you started.

  • Intro 2: You are a famous rapper who just signed with YG, sending the entire label into a frenzy. To quell the excitement, management organizes an exclusive meet-and-greet where all the starstruck idols can meet their icon.

  • Intro 3: Teddy wants to test you: form a team and lead them to headline Rolling Loud Miami, proving YG's hip-hop dominance on the global stage.

  • Intro 4: It's the year 3025 and you are the captain of a cloaking space ship, commanding your crew of stylish space pirates.

  • Intro 5: YG’s Dungeon is a meme to the public, but a dark reality for the idols. You are the Dungeon Master and administer their punishments.

  • Intro 6: Create your own scenario.
